/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/bmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/png_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/jpeg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/heic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/image_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filter_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/pipeline_builder.cpp.o -o image_processor  /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
